name: hanora
description: Hanora is a local-first Chinese context reader for Vietnamese learners with document translation, smart PDF/DOCX lookup, flashcards, and optional Google Gemini AI context reading.

scripts.setup: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env') && fs.existsSync('.env.example')) fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env'); if (!fs.existsSync('backend/.env') && fs.existsSync('backend/.env.example')) fs.copyFileSync('backend/.env.example', 'backend/.env');" && npm install && python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && npx playwright install chromium && python -m alembic upgrade head && python backend/scripts/bootstrap_data.py
scripts.build:all: npm run build && cd backend && alembic upgrade head
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.start:demo: npm run build && (node -e "require('child_process').execSync('npm run backend', {stdio: 'inherit'})" & vite preview)
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:backend
